name: Vera
description: AI broker for real tokenized stocks on Mantle. You tell Vera a goal in plain words; she builds a diversified portfolio of xStocks (issued by Backed, traded on Fluxion), signs every recommendation with EIP-712, commits it on-chain via StaxExecutor before execution, and places it gasless (ERC-4337). Autopilot runs the strategy on a schedule inside hard user-set bounds: amount, cadence, risk ceiling, spend cap. Every run is checked against those limits before anything signs. Non-custodial; the user holds the tokens.

metadata.note: Vera also holds agentId 1 in Stax's own ERC-8004-style IdentityRegistry on Mantle (address above); recommendations are committed through StaxExecutor and risk-gated by InferenceVerifier.
